subcodes.first_line: The resplendent, effulgent Light that shineth forth from the horizon of the heaven of bounty be upon thee, O thou who gazest toward the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: النور الساطع اللامع المشرق فی افق سماء العطاء علیک یا ایها الناظر الی الافق
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for martyrs, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @eulogies; reminiscences, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @visitation Tablets
